verdict.moderator_pairing_notes: The moderator correctly identified a consensus in Round 1 (all agents listed Botswana as a top candidate) and terminated the process. No pairings were necessary.
verdict.judge_synthesis_notes: The judge correctly followed the evidence hierarchy by noting the lack of hard constraints (linguistic/regulatory) and relying on the consensus of soft evidence (landscape, botany, meta). The reasoning was sound based on the available data, even though the final prediction (Botswana) was incorrect.
